action.reasoning: Observation: This is iteration 0 with a fresh workspace. We need to build a complete pipeline for stock return prediction using Qlib Alpha158 on CSI300. The primary metric is ic_mean. Strategy: implement a simple MLP baseline, train for a few epochs to validate the pipeline, measure iteration time, and submit evaluation. We will create model.py (MLP), train.py (data loading, training, saving), and predict.py (inference + IC computation). We also create a dummy eval_config.json to test predict.py locally before submission.
action.command: echo '{"test_period": ["2022-01-01", "2023-12-31"], "universe": "csi300", "feature_set": "Alpha158"}' > /data/eval_config.json && python train.py --epochs 5 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints --output test_output.json
